sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92780" key="r(uqmogra/fos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥυθμο-γράφος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <sense id="n92780.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">writing on rhythms</tr_>, of Hephaestion, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Tz.</author> </bibl> in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">An.Par.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.95</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
